---
title : "The Legitimacy of the Distributive System: A Comparison of Germany and Chile"
date : "2008-07-01"
author : "Castillo, J. & Schneider, S."
categories : ["Conference paper"]
publication : " 31st Conference of the International Society of Political Psychology - ISPP (Paris, 9-12 July).. Paris"
publication_short : " 31st Conference of the International Society of Political Psychology - ISPP (Paris, 9-12 July).. Paris"
abstract : "(Abstract not available)"
abstract_short : ""
about:
  template: marquee
---
---


::: {.callout-note title="How to cite this work"}

Castillo, J. & Schneider, S. (2008). *The Legitimacy of the Distributive System: A Comparison of Germany and Chile*.  31st Conference of the International Society of Political Psychology - ISPP (Paris, 9-12 July).. Paris

:::
